name: My neck hurts from repetitive work but no single accident, is it compensable?

mainEntity.name: My neck hurts from repetitive work but no single accident, is it compensable?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, cumulative trauma neck injuries qualify as occupational if work caused.** Utah/Idaho cover gradual onset with medical proof.[1] Key factors: Show job duties primary cause; symptom logs; specialist opinion. Harder than acute; report when disabling. Attorney builds gradual case.
